result.stdout:
0.1.6.0

Usage: ejson [options] [command]

Options:
  --help       Show help information
  --version    Show version information
  --keydir|-k  Directory containing EJSON keys [$EJSON_KEYDIR]

Commands:
  decrypt  decrypt an EJSON file
  encrypt  (re-)encrypt one or more EJSON files
  keygen   generate a new EJSON keypair

Use "ejson [command] --help" for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
0.1.6.0

Usage: ejson [options] [command]

Options:
  --help       Show help information
  --version    Show version information
  --keydir|-k  Directory containing EJSON keys [$EJSON_KEYDIR]

Commands:
  decrypt  decrypt an EJSON file
  encrypt  (re-)encrypt one or more EJSON files
  keygen   generate a new EJSON keypair

Use "ejson [command] --help" for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Usage: ejson decrypt [arguments] [options]

Arguments:
  <file>  name of the file to decrypt

Options:
  --help  Show help information
  -o      print output to the provided file, rather than stdout
